name: io.github.Timwal78/squeezeos
title: SqueezeOS — Institutional Market Intelligence
description: 33 MCP tools: squeeze scanner, options flow, AI verdicts, signal marketplace. x402 pay-per-call.

headers.name: X-Payment-Token
headers.description: JWT payment token required for premium tools only. Obtain via: call get_invoice with the endpoint_id → pay RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base → call verify_payment with the tx_hash. Token valid 1 hour. Free tools work without this header.
